description: Audit and align the existing codebase to the agreed architecture. This MVP does not add new screens. It restructures existing files, removes duplicates, adds the logger, secureStore wrapper, query config registry, and enforces the folder conventions so all future MVPs build on a clean foundation.

issues_found.resolution: Delete store/auth.store.ts at root. Canonical location is src/store/slices/auth.slice.ts. Update all imports.

issues_found.issue: store/ folder at root instead of inside src/
issues_found.resolution: Move all store files into src/store/slices/. Remove root-level store/ folder.

issues_found.issue: TOKEN_KEY constant duplicated in multiple files
issues_found.resolution: Define TOKEN_KEY once in src/lib/secure-store/index.ts and import everywhere.

issues_found.issue: expo-secure-store called directly in app files
issues_found.resolution: All SecureStore calls must go through src/lib/secure-store/index.ts wrapper only.

issues_found.issue: fetch() called directly in app files for auth
issues_found.resolution: Auth API calls move to src/features/auth/mutations.ts and src/features/auth/api.ts.
Replace hardcoded value with STALE.medium from src/lib/query/config.ts.

issues_found.issue: No global error handler on QueryClient
issues_found.resolution: Add defaultOptions.queries.onError and defaultOptions.mutations.onError calling logger.error.
Keep as-is with TODO comment for now — this is intentional for the template. Add typed adapter pattern comment.

issues_found.issue: No logger — console usage will be scattered
issues_found.resolution: Create src/lib/logger/index.ts. No direct console calls anywhere in the codebase.

issues_found.issue: LoadingSpinner uses ActivityIndicator (spinner) instead of skeleton
issues_found.resolution: Keep LoadingSpinner for full-screen blocking loads only. Add SkeletonLoader for data screens.

issues_found.issue: AuthGate bootstrap does raw fetch to /api/auth/get-session
issues_found.resolution: Move bootstrap logic to src/features/auth/api.ts getSession(). AuthGate calls that function.

issues_found.issue: Server ping dev tool hardcoded in sign-in screen
issues_found.resolution: Wrap entire ping card in __DEV__ check so it never ships in production builds.

issues_found.issue: useAuthStore imported from @/store/auth.store — path resolves to root store/
issues_found.resolution: After store consolidation, all imports use @/src/store or configure tsconfig alias to src/store.

target_folder_structure.description: The canonical structure all future MVPs will follow

app._layout.tsx: Root layout — providers, AuthGate, splash gate

(auth)._layout.tsx: Auth group layout — redirect if already authenticated

(app)._layout.tsx: App group layout — tab navigator, role-based tab config

ui.Screen.tsx: Safe area screen wrapper — existing, keep
ui.SkeletonLoader.tsx: Skeleton placeholder for data screens (add in MVP 1)
ui.OfflineBanner.tsx: Inline offline banner for mid-session drops (MVP 4)

auth.api.ts: getSession(), signOut() — raw fetch calls extracted from app files
auth.adapter.ts: AuthAdapter interface for better-auth and custom backend

logger.index.ts: Logger export — only import used across codebase
logger.logger.ts: Core implementation with levels: debug, info, warn, error

secure-store.index.ts: Wrapper around expo-secure-store with logger and TOKEN_KEY

query.persister.ts: Placeholder — secure persister for non-sensitive queries

lib.query-client.ts: QueryClient instance — uses config.ts constants, global error logger
lib.trpc.ts: tRPC client — existing, add onError logger

slices.ui.slice.ts: UI flags: modals, drawers, loading overlays

files_to_create.description: Core logger with debug, info, warn, error levels. Uses __DEV__ to gate console output. Calls remote transport for warn and error in production.
rules: Never call console.log, console.warn, console.error directly anywhere in the codebase
Every catch block must call logger.error with error object and context
No silent empty catch blocks

files_to_create.description: Re-exports logger as default. This is the only path the rest of the app imports from.
Placeholder remote transport. Noop until Sentry/Datadog is wired in.
Wraps expo-secure-store get/set/delete. Defines TOKEN_KEY. Catches all errors and calls logger.error. Returns null on failure, never throws.
rules: expo-secure-store must ONLY be called through this file
Never import expo-secure-store directly outside this file

files_to_create.description: STALE and GC time constants. Single source of truth for all staleTime and gcTime values.
All TanStack Query key factories. No query key string may be defined outside this file.
Consolidated from store/auth.store.ts and src/store/auth.store.ts. Adds role field to User type for future role-based nav.
changes_from_existing: Add role: string to User type
Add setLoading action (already in root store version — keep it)

files_to_create.description: User preferences: theme (light/dark/system), language. Persisted via zustand/middleware persist.
Barrel export for all store slices
getTabsForRole(role) returns tab config array for the given role. Used in (app)/_layout.tsx.
Raw fetch calls extracted from app/_layout.tsx and app/(app)/index.tsx. getSession(token) and signOut(token).
Animated skeleton placeholder. Accepts width, height, borderRadius props. Uses Reanimated for shimmer.

changes: Import STALE from src/lib/query/config.ts
Replace hardcoded staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5 with STALE.medium
Add defaultOptions.queries.onError: (error) => logger.error('Query failed', error)
Add defaultOptions.mutations.onError: (error) => logger.error('Mutation failed', error)
Import logger
Add onError callback to httpBatchLink that calls logger.error with path and error
Remove direct SecureStore import — use secureStore wrapper
Remove TOKEN_KEY constant — import from secure-store wrapper
Extract bootstrap fetch logic to src/features/auth/api.ts getSession()
Wrap bootstrap in try/catch calling logger.error on failure
Import useUIStore for session expired modal state (wired up in MVP 2)
Remove direct SecureStore import — use secureStore wrapper
Remove TOKEN_KEY constant — import from secure-store wrapper
Move signOut fetch call to src/features/auth/api.ts signOut()
Wrap signOut in try/catch calling logger.error
Remove direct SecureStore import — use secureStore wrapper
Remove TOKEN_KEY constant — import from secure-store wrapper
Move onSubmit fetch to src/features/auth/mutations.ts signIn()
Wrap ping card in {__DEV__ && ...} — never ships in production
Replace catch {} silent block with logger.error call
Import getTabsForRole from src/navigation/tabs.config.ts
Import useAuthStore to get user role
Replace hardcoded Tabs.Screen list with tabs.map() from getTabsForRole

files_to_delete.reason: Duplicate of src/store/slices/auth.slice.ts. Root-level store folder is not the canonical location.

data_flow: 1. App boots — RootLayout mounts providers (GestureHandler, HeroUI, QueryClient)
3. bootstrap() calls secureStore.get(TOKEN_KEY) — wrapper handles errors, returns null on failure
4. If no token: clearAuth() — isLoading false, AuthGate redirects to sign-in
5. If token found: src/features/auth/api.ts getSession(token) called
6. getSession success: setAuth(user, token) — isLoading false, AuthGate redirects to app
7. getSession fail: secureStore.delete(TOKEN_KEY), clearAuth(), logger.error logs the failure
8. All errors logged through src/lib/logger/index.ts — never swallowed silently

acceptance_criteria.given: The codebase has duplicate store files at store/ and src/store/
acceptance_criteria.then: Only src/store/slices/auth.slice.ts exists. Root store/ folder is deleted. All imports updated.

acceptance_criteria.given: expo-secure-store is called directly in 3 app files
acceptance_criteria.then: Zero direct expo-secure-store imports outside src/lib/secure-store/index.ts

acceptance_criteria.given: TOKEN_KEY is defined in 3 separate files
acceptance_criteria.then: TOKEN_KEY defined once in src/lib/secure-store/index.ts. No other definition exists.

acceptance_criteria.given: No logger exists — console usage will spread
acceptance_criteria.then: src/lib/logger/index.ts exists. Zero console.log/warn/error calls in the codebase. Every catch block calls logger.error.

acceptance_criteria.given: Dev ping tool ships to production
acceptance_criteria.then: Ping card in sign-in.tsx is wrapped in __DEV__ — invisible in production builds

acceptance_criteria.given: Auth fetch calls are inline in app/ files
acceptance_criteria.then: getSession() and signOut() live in src/features/auth/api.ts. App files call them.
Tabs rendered from getTabsForRole(user.role) — ready for role-based nav in MVP 3

edge_cases: secureStore.get() returns null on rooted Android devices where EncryptedSharedPreferences fails — bootstrap handles null gracefully by calling clearAuth()
If src/store/slices/auth.slice.ts import path differs from old @/store/auth.store alias — update tsconfig.json paths or babel alias accordingly
SkeletonLoader shimmer animation must use Reanimated useSharedValue on the UI thread — do not use Animated from react-native
getTabsForRole must return at least one tab — empty array causes Tabs navigator crash

splash_gate_sequence.description: expo-splash-screen must gate the entire boot sequence. This is the exact implementation required in app/_layout.tsx.
steps: 1. Call SplashScreen.preventAutoHideAsync() at module level — before RootLayout function, not inside useEffect
3. bootstrap() runs: secureStore read → getSession or clearAuth
4. After auth state is resolved (either setAuth or clearAuth called): SplashScreen.hideAsync()
5. AuthGate renders — auth state already known, zero flash
critical_rules: SplashScreen.preventAutoHideAsync() must be at module scope — calling inside useEffect is too late
SplashScreen.hideAsync() must be called in BOTH success and failure paths of bootstrap
Never hide splash before auth state is resolved — the overlay pattern in existing code is a workaround, replace it with proper splash gating

state_decision_boundary.description: Enforced rules for what lives where. Claude Code must reference these when generating any state-related code.
rules: Server data from any API → TanStack Query only. Never copy into Zustand.
UI state (modal open, drawer visible, loading overlay) → useUIStore (Zustand ui.slice.ts)
Auth session and token → useAuthStore (Zustand auth.slice.ts). Hydrated from secureStore on boot.
User preferences (theme, language, hasSeenOnboarding) → usePreferencesStore (Zustand preferences.slice.ts). Persisted.
Cross-screen transient state (multi-step form data, wizard progress) → Zustand if needed, scoped slice
Single-screen local state → useState or useReducer
Never use useState for state shared across more than one component — lift to Zustand or Query
Never sync a TanStack Query result into Zustand — use select() or derive in component

per_screen_refetch_rules.description: Default refetch behavior per screen type. Applied to all useQuery hooks via their options.

screen_types.note: Disable all background refetch on form screens — state change mid-fill breaks UX
Already loaded at session level — no need to refetch

claude_code_enforcement_rules.description: Paste these verbatim as Claude Code instructions before running any MVP
rules: All server/API state must use TanStack Query via tRPC hooks. Never store API responses in Zustand.
Zustand is for client-owned state only: auth session, UI flags, user preferences.
No useState for state that crosses more than one component — use Zustand or TanStack Query.
All Zustand slices must be in src/store/slices/, composed and exported from src/store/index.ts.
Query keys must be defined in src/lib/query/keys.ts only. No inline string arrays in useQuery calls.
staleTime values must reference STALE constants from src/lib/query/config.ts. No hardcoded ms values.
expo-secure-store must only be accessed through src/lib/secure-store/index.ts. No direct imports.
Never use console.log, console.warn, or console.error. All logging through src/lib/logger/index.ts.
Every catch block must call logger.error with the error and a context object. No silent catch blocks.
Form screens must set refetchOnWindowFocus:false and refetchOnAppFocus:false on all queries.
SplashScreen.preventAutoHideAsync() must be called at module scope in app/_layout.tsx.
router.replace() must be used for all auth navigation transitions — never router.push().

out_of_scope: New screens — no new screens in this MVP
Auth adapter pattern implementation — folder and interface created, implementations in MVP 2
Offline detection — OfflineBanner component folder created but not wired in MVP 1
Session expired modal — ui.slice.ts created but modal screen built in MVP 2
Role-based tab visibility beyond Home — tabs.config.ts scaffolded, populated in MVP 3
